ref_text: HE WAS IN A FEVERED STATE OF MIND OWING TO THE BLIGHT HIS WIFE'S ACTION THREATENED TO CAST UPON HIS ENTIRE FUTURE

ref_text: HE WOULD HAVE TO PAY HER THE MONEY WHICH SHE WOULD NOW REGULARLY DEMAND OR THERE WOULD BE TROUBLE IT DID NOT MATTER WHAT HE DID
ref_phon: hiː wʊdhˌavtə pˈeɪ hɜː ðə mˈʌni wˌɪtʃ ʃiː wʊd nˈaʊ ɹˈɛɡjʊləli dɪmˈand ɔː ðeə wʊd biː tɹˈʌbəl ˌaɪtˈiː dɪdnˌɒt mˈatə wɒt hiː dˈɪd

ref_text: HURSTWOOD WALKED THE FLOOR MENTALLY ARRANGING THE CHIEF POINTS OF HIS SITUATION
ref_phon: hˈɜːstwʊd wˈɔːkt ðə flˈɔː mˈɛntəli ɐɹˈeɪndʒɪŋ ðə tʃˈiːf pˈɔɪnts ɒv hɪz sˌɪtʃuːˈeɪʃən

ref_text: HE ALSO THOUGHT OF HIS MANAGERIAL POSITION

ref_text: HOW WOULD THE PAPERS TALK ABOUT IT

ref_text: MANY LITTLE WRINKLES GATHERED BETWEEN HIS EYES AS HE CONTEMPLATED THIS AND HIS BROW MOISTENED

ref_text: HE COULD ARRANGE THAT SATISFACTORILY FOR CARRIE WOULD BE GLAD TO WAIT IF NECESSARY

ref_text: HE WOULD SEE HOW THINGS TURNED OUT TO MORROW AND THEN HE WOULD TALK TO HER THEY WERE GOING TO MEET AS USUAL
ref_phon: hiː wʊd sˈiː hˌaʊ θˈɪŋz tˈɜːnd ˈaʊt tuː mˈɒɹəʊ and ðˈɛn hiː wʊd tˈɔːk tuː hɜː ðeɪ wɜː ɡˌəʊɪŋ tuː mˈiːt az jˈuːʒuːəl

ref_text: FOR SOME REASON HE FELT AS IF SOMETHING MIGHT COME THAT WAY AND WAS RELIEVED WHEN ALL THE ENVELOPES HAD BEEN SCANNED AND NOTHING SUSPICIOUS NOTICED
ref_phon: fɔː sˌʌm ɹˈiːzən hiː fˈɛlt az ɪf sˈʌmθɪŋ mˌaɪt kˈʌm ðat wˈeɪ and wɒz ɹɪlˈiːvd wɛn ˈɔːl ðɪ ˈɛnvəlˌəʊps hɐdbɪn skˈand and nˈʌθɪŋ səspˈɪʃəs nˈəʊtɪst

ref_text: WHILE THE DANGER HAD NOT LESSENED IT HAD NOT AS YET MATERIALISED AND WITH HIM NO NEWS WAS GOOD NEWS

ref_text: SO LITTLE DID HE CONSIDER DROUET THAT IT NEVER ONCE OCCURRED TO HIM TO WORRY ABOUT HIS FINDING OUT

ref_text: FORTUNATELY THERE WAS NOTHING FROM HIS WIFE EITHER
